name: WillScot Holdings Corp
business: WillScot Holdings Corp is a leading business services provider specializing in innovative and flexible turnkey temporary space solutions, including modular offices, portable storage, and climate-controlled containers. It services diverse end markets from approximately 260 branch locations in the US, Canada, and Mexico.

exposures.sentence: Our value-added products (VAPS), such as workstations, furniture, appliances, media packages, power and solar solutions, telematics, connectivity and data solutions, security and protection products, entrance packages, electrical and lighting products, organization and space optimization assets, perimeter solutions, and other items.

catalysts.event: Roll out further enhancements to sales enablement platform in early 2026
catalysts.sentence: We intend to roll out further enhancements to our sales enablement platform in early 2026 to provide complete, accurate, and timely visibility into every project opportunity.

catalysts.event: Introduce Quick Connect Canopy (QCC) clearspan product in 2026
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, we plan to introduce the Quick Connect Canopy ("QCC") as a new organic, ground up development of our clearspan solutions.

tamClaims.sentence: Consequently, we believe that our total addressable market is approximately $20 billion.
